hooks.name: Version Bump Docs Reminder
hooks.description: When the VERSION file is edited, reminds to update the wiki Home page version and consider creating a GitHub release.

action.prompt: The VERSION file was just edited. Remind the user to: 1) Update the version in wiki/Home.md to match 2) Create a git tag (git tag -a vX.Y.Z) 3) Create a GitHub release with release notes 4) Push both main and tags (git push origin main --tags)
